title_en: Master Student · SJTU School of Medicine · AI4Rad Lab
title_cn: 硕士研究生 · 上海交通大学医学院 · AI4Rad Lab
bio_en: Master student at SJTU School of Medicine and a member of AI4Rad Lab. Research interests include clinical radiology and large language model frameworks for emergency and stroke imaging.
bio_cn: 上海交通大学医学院硕士研究生，AI4Rad Lab 成员。研究方向包括临床放射学，以及面向急诊与卒中影像的大语言模型框架。
interests_en: Large language model frameworks for emergency stroke imaging
interests_cn: 面向急诊卒中影像的大语言模型框架
